title: MappingSuggestion
description: Canonical structured output for one assisted manual mapping suggestion. This contract prepares a future evidence-first runtime, but does not imply that a runtime model is delivered.

accountCode.description: Canonical account code from the latest balance import line.

accountLabel.description: Canonical account label from the latest balance import line.

suggestedTargetCode.description: Suggested mapping target code. It must resolve to a selectable target from the active taxonomy or an explicitly accepted selectable legacy code before it is exposed.

requiresHumanReview.description: All mapping suggestions require explicit human review. Any output with another value is invalid.

evidence.description: Evidence used for the suggestion. It must be tenant-scoped, non-sensitive, and sufficient for human review.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned schema version used to validate this structured output.

promptVersion.description: Pinned prompt version. Stub or contract-only implementations may use a documented not_applicable value.

modelVersion.description: Pinned model version. Stub or contract-only implementations may use a documented not_applicable value.
